brand_identity.name: Ben's Road Service LLC
brand_identity.mission: To provide rapid, reliable towing and roadside assistance across Oregon, 24/7.

grid.bento_primary: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

primary.classes: bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-primary-foreground font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(249,115,22,0.5)] active:scale-95

secondary.classes: bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 text-white font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 transition-all

emergency.classes: bg-gradient-to-r from-orange-500 to-red-600 text-white font-black uppercase tracking-wider rounded-lg px-6 py-3 animate-pulse-slow shadow-lg shadow-orange-500/20

cards.glass: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-orange-500/30 transition-colors duration-300
cards.solid: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl

inputs.default: bg-zinc-950/50 border border-zinc-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 transition-all outline-none

hero_bg.alt: Ben's Road Service Tow Truck at Night
hero_bg.usage: Full screen hero background with heavy dark overlay

map_placeholder.description: Use a dark-themed map style (Snazzy Maps 'Dark' or Mapbox Dark) centered on Salem, OR.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on dark backgrounds is at least text-gray-300 or lighter. Primary buttons must have white text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-orange-500 focus state.
accessibility.screen_readers: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label. Images must have alt text.

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a single-page React app (Landing Page) + Admin Dashboard (Login/Protected). Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'sonner' for toasts.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_rules: Always use <main className='min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground font-body'> wrapper. Avoid pure white backgrounds; use zinc-950 for dark mode feel.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_optimization: Ensure the 'Call Now' FAB is sticky on mobile screens (bottom-4 right-4 or full width bottom bar). Touch targets must be >44px.
instructions_to_main_agent.language_toggle: Implement a global context or state for Language (EN/ES). All text content must be switchable.
instructions_to_main_agent.quote_calculator: Create a distinct section with a form: Vehicle Type, Service Needed, Location (Zip), Dropoff (Zip). Calculate estimated price: Base ($75) + Mileage ($3/mile). This is an ESTIMATE.
instructions_to_main_agent.admin_dashboard: Simple table view of quote requests. Protect with basic hardcoded auth for MVP (e.g., user: admin, pass: bensroadservice2024).
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Force dark mode by default in tailwind config or html class. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless requested later.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
